text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of the Centaur Stakes. Once the
race is over, Sakura Bakushin O will have run a
combined 3,600 meters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Believing this win will make her a stayer, Sakura
Bakushin O takes the stage with bated breath!
